div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SpacesSync.json
~/.hammerspoon/
＊canonical config＊
enabled, syncMode, groupOf,
groupLabels, spaceNames,
_lastSeen — name, uuid, date, wasIn
switchDelay, debounceSeconds,
popupDuration, statusDuration,
hotkeys

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
hs.settings plist
＊legacy＊
pre-v3 Space names
read once on first run,
migrated into JSON spaceNames,
then ignored
